topic_definition: Language in job descriptions that signals the expectation of verifying that engineering work is correct, safe, and trustworthy before and after deployment. Covers classical software testing/QA, CI/CD-driven quality gates, code review as a correctness-checking activity, static analysis and compliance, reproducibility and artifact-based proof (logs, screenshots, recordings), evaluation harnesses for AI output, and post-deployment observability used to confirm behavior in production.

concepts.name: Automated testing
concepts.definition: Writing and maintaining automated tests to verify code behavior at unit, integration, end-to-end, or regression levels.

topic_calibration_recommendations: After first pass, sample 100 random matches per concept stratified by year and role family. Specifically validate: (1) bare 'CI' / 'CD' / 'eval' / 'audit' / 'monitor' / 'review' / 'log' false-positive rates; if any exceeds ~5% drop the bare form and keep only compound forms. (2) Cross-tab 'code review' matches with the Mentorship topic — report co-occurrence rate and decide assignment policy at analysis time rather than at extraction time (i.e., extract once, label twice). (3) Spot-check 'evaluation' in benefits/HR sections: if >10% are HR-flavored, drop bare 'evaluation' and keep only 'eval', 'evals', 'eval harness', 'evaluation framework', 'evaluation pipeline', 'model evaluation', 'LLM evaluation'. (4) Confirm tooling brand names (Datadog, Sentry, etc.) are mentioned with verification intent and not just in a generic tech-stack list — if needed, count tooling separately as a distinct sub-feature.
topic_notes: Code-review overlap with Mentorship is intentional and flagged here per the prompt. Recommendation: do not double-count at extraction time; instead, store a per-mention 'topics' multilabel and resolve at the analysis layer using context (mentorship-context tokens like 'mentor', 'coach', 'grow junior engineers' nearby tip toward Mentorship; defect/bug/quality tokens tip toward Verification). The 'Evaluations and AI output verification' concept is the key 2024->2026 shift signal — evals/HITL/red-teaming/LLM-as-a-judge vocabulary should be tracked as its own sub-index in addition to rolling up to Verification, since that is a hypothesized growth area in the AI transition.
